scope: Promote V12 SimdContextSwitchBenchmark semantic evidence into the Phase 9 experiment matrix
Add machine-checkable vmos-experiment-report evidence for M1
Add golden trace tying M1 to the underlying semantic command, event, ViewV1, and invariant
Validate osctl experiment report JSON and osctl simd-context-switch-benchmark stable ViewV1 evidence
Use scalar_context_switch_nanos as the M1 baseline while leaving SIMD speedup/context overhead synthesis for M8

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: experiment evidence references simd-context-switch-benchmark:22012@1 by exact kind/id/generation
context-switch benchmark references preemption, resume, vector state, and target feature set through historical exact-generation edges
osctl exposes stable simd-context-switch-benchmark ViewV1 and experiment report JSON
checkpoint report records scope, no-goals, validation, evidence, and next checkpoint

findings_fixed: M1 does not create a parallel context-switch truth source; it references the existing V12 SimdContextSwitchBenchmark evidence
Experiment report uses vmos-experiment-report schema rather than vmos-benchmark-report
osctl experiment report --json validates the experiment report as stable control-plane evidence
No Rust runtime or adapter path changed for M1
bad_smells_checked: No CLI output string is treated as semantic truth
No raw vector register payload is exported
No target hardware SIMD enablement is claimed
No third-party crate or adapter internal state appears in the experiment schema
residual_notes: M2 owns SMP scaling experiment evidence
M8 will combine SIMD speedup and context overhead evidence rather than replacing this M1 baseline

residual_gaps: M1 is host-validation semantic harness evidence, not calibrated target hardware context switch timing
